meanings.usage: 指最佳成绩或官方记载
指把信息写下来或录制
指物体运动的快慢程度
指提供动力的机械装置
指做某事时遇到的障碍
指因期望落空而感到不开心
指到达某个地点或程度
指对某物进行管理或支配
follow in someone's footsteps表示继承某人的事业
指物体从一端到另一端的距离

phrases.phrase: set up a new world record

examples.en: She set up a new world record in the 100-meter dash.
examples.zh: 她在百米赛跑中创造了新的世界纪录。

phrases.phrase: have great difficulty in doing something
phrases.usage: 在做某事方面有很大困难

examples.en: He had great difficulty in controlling the car.
examples.zh: 他在控制汽车方面有很大困难。

examples.en: I was disappointed to learn that the concert was cancelled.
examples.zh: 我失望地得知音乐会取消了。

examples.en: The train can reach speeds of over 300 kilometers per hour.
examples.zh: 这列火车可以达到每小时300公里以上的速度。

phrases.usage: 追随某人的脚步；继承衣钵

examples.en: She followed in her mother's footsteps and became a doctor.
examples.zh: 她追随母亲的脚步，成为了一名医生。

examples.en: The racing car drove at over 200 miles per hour.
examples.zh: 这辆赛车以超过每小时200英里的速度行驶。

examples.en: A few days later, we received the good news.
examples.zh: 几天后，我们收到了好消息。

examples.en: This car was specially built for the racing competition.
examples.zh: 这辆车是为赛车比赛专门建造的。

examples.en: Although it was raining, we still went out.
examples.zh: 虽然下雨了，但我们还是出去了。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作，或称为"过去的过去"
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个发生在过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时

examples.en: He was disappointed because his average speed had been 299 miles per hour.
examples.zh: 他很失望，因为他的平均速度是299英里/小时。

examples.en: A few days later, he was told that a mistake had been made.
examples.zh: 几天后，有人告诉他一个错误已经犯了。

grammar.title: although 引导的让步状语从句
grammar.definition: although引导让步状语从句，表示"虽然...但是..."
grammar.structure: Although + 主语 + 动词(从句), 主语 + 动词(主句)
grammar.usage: although引导的从句放在句首，修饰主句的转折关系。注意：although和but不能同时使用

examples.en: Although Campbell reached a speed of over 304 miles per hour, he had great difficulty in controlling the car.
examples.zh: 虽然坎贝尔达到了每小时304英里以上的速度，但他很难控制汽车。

grammar.title: 被动语态 (Passive Voice)
grammar.definition: 当动作的承受者作为句子的主语时，使用被动语态
grammar.structure: 主语 + be + 过去分词 (+ by + 动作执行者)
grammar.usage: 用于强调动作的承受者或不知道动作执行者时

examples.en: Bluebird had been specially built for him.
examples.zh: 蓝鸟号是专门为他建造的。

examples.en: He was told that a mistake had been made.
examples.zh: 有人告诉他犯了一个错误。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + was/were + 形容词 + to do something

original.en: Campbell was disappointed to learn that his average speed had been 299 miles per hour.
original.zh: 坎贝尔失望地得知他的平均速度是299英里/小时。

imitations.en: She was happy to hear the good news.
imitations.zh: 她高兴地听到这个消息。

imitations.en: I was surprised to see him there.
imitations.zh: 我很惊讶在那里见到他。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + set up + a + 形容词 + world record + 时间/地点

original.en: He set up a new world record in September 1935 at Bonneville Salt Flats, Utah.
original.zh: 1935年9月，他在犹他州的博纳维尤盐沼创造了新的世界纪录。

imitations.en: She set up a new world record in the Olympic Games.
imitations.zh: 她在奥运会上创造了新的世界纪录。

imitations.en: He set up a new record at the age of 25.
imitations.zh: 他在25岁时创造了新的纪录。

sentencePatterns.pattern: although + 主语 + 动词..., 主语 + 动词...

original.en: Although Campbell reached a speed of over 304 miles per hour, he had great difficulty in controlling the car.
original.zh: 虽然坎贝尔达到了每小时304英里以上的速度，但他很难控制汽车。

imitations.en: Although it was very cold, we went swimming.
imitations.zh: 虽然天气很冷，我们还是去游泳了。

imitations.en: Although she studied hard, she failed the exam.
imitations.zh: 虽然她学习很努力，但她考试没通过。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Following in someone's footsteps, 主语 + 动词

original.en: Following in his father's footsteps many years later, Sir Malcolm's son also set up a world record.
original.zh: 多年后，继承父亲的衣钵，坎贝尔爵士的儿子也创造了世界纪录。

imitations.en: Following in her teacher's footsteps, she became a professor.
imitations.zh: 继承她老师的衣钵，她成为了一名教授。

imitations.en: Following in his brother's footsteps, he joined the army.
imitations.zh: 追随他哥哥的脚步，他参了军。
